title: volcanic crater water pond in crater lake
script_key: you re seeing water in a steaming crater the rim edges glow red from heat below that s why fish live here the water s warm year round but not too hot watch the mist swirl over the surface bet you didn t expect a pond inside an active volcano

title: steaming sulfur vents leak toxic gas
script_key: steaming sulfur vents leak toxic gas that s why the air above looks like a boiling pot these aren t just hot spots they re earth s natural vents pushing sulfur dioxide into the sky why does it smell like rotten eggs because that s exactly what sulfur dioxide does ever smelled a volcano next time you do hold your breath

title: fitz roy peak hides a crack that shouldn't exist
script_key: this crack shouldn t be here fitz roy s granite splits like a zipper because the mountain s still lifting but that crack it s a trick rain and ice chew the rock from the inside out hollowing it faster than the peak rises that s why climbers whisper about the mountain breathing ever seen rock behave like this
